title: eulophia lamellata
intro: Eulophia lamellata, also known as the Tiger Orchid, is a species of orchid that is native to tropical Africa, characterized by its distinctive yellow and brown flowers with a pattern resembling a tiger's stripes. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Eulophia lamellata include its ability to treat fever, headache, and skin irritations, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive issues and respiratory problems. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
